Features.subtitle: One Platform, 7 Powerful Tools
Features.title: Everything you need to grow your e-commerce business at scale.
Features.desc: EcoMate centralizes every tool Algerian SMEs need into one platform — AI chatbot automation, order management, CRM, and AI-powered client acquisition.

HowItWorks.title: Your journey to automation in 4 simple steps.

one.title: Connect Your Shop
one.desc: Link Shopify, WooCommerce, or your social pages to EcoMate.

two.title: Setup AI Assistant
two.desc: Train your AI on products in seconds and go live.

three.title: Capture Orders Hub
three.desc: AI handles chats, confirms orders, syncs to dashboard.

four.title: Fulfill & Scale
four.desc: Print labels, track delivery, and see your profit grow.

Hero.badge: All-in-One SaaS Platform for Algerian Business
Hero.desc: EcoMate centralizes every tool Algerian SMEs need into one platform — AI chatbot automation, order management, CRM, and AI-powered client acquisition. No technical knowledge required.

DashboardPreview.subtitle: Powerful Management
DashboardPreview.title: Control your entire empire from a single dashboard.
DashboardPreview.desc: EcoMate provides clear insights into your business performance, marketing ROAS, and customer behavior with one simple link.

AI.subtitle: AI-Powered Core
AI.title: Your store sells while you sleep.
AI.desc: Our AI handles the full customer journey — product discovery, order confirmation, and delivery tracking — automatically in Arabic, French, and English.
AI.platformsDesc: Messenger, Instagram DM, WhatsApp, and more — wherever your customers are.
AI.shoppingDesc: Customers browse products, pick options, and order — all within the conversation.
AI.orderDesc: Every order logged instantly to your dashboard and Google Sheets.
AI.trackingDesc: Integrates with all Algerian delivery companies.
